tool.name: EnzyWizard Mut-Integrate
tool.description: Integrate wild-type and mutant EnzyWizard JSON reports into paired graph datasets

param.name: mut_clean_report
param.label: Mut-Clean JSON report
param.help: Path to the required enzywizard_mut_clean JSON report.

param.name: wt_input_dir
param.label: Wild-type reports directory
param.help: Directory containing wild-type JSON reports to integrate.

param.name: mut_input_dir
param.label: Mutant reports directory
param.help: Directory containing mutant JSON reports to integrate.

tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Mut-Integrate**
Integrates wild-type and mutant EnzyWizard JSON reports and constructs matched wild-type/mutant protein graph representations.
**Inputs** - Mut-Clean JSON report. - Directories containing wild-type and mutant JSON reports.
**Outputs** - Paired graph datasets in JSON format.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-mut-integrate` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-mut-integrate
